evals.prompt: 把这篇 Markdown 文章发布到 WordPress（草稿）
evals.input: article.md containing H1 title, blockquote excerpt, table, and code block
evals.expected: Draft created at WordPress, post ID returned, link to wp-admin edit page shown, title extracted from H1, excerpt from first blockquote
Post published live, returns public post URL (not draft), status: 'publish' in response

evals.prompt: Post with custom title, override the H1
evals.expected: Draft created with title '自定义标题' (ignoring H1 in file), correct CSS styling applied

evals.input: Wrong WP_PASS set, correct WP_URL and WP_USER
evals.expected: Clear error: '❌ 发布失败: Sorry, you are not allowed to create posts as this user.', guidance to regenerate WordPress app password
